events.name: Run Crew Night
events.description: Community-forward shake hosted with PYNRS and Kane to kick off marathon week. A vibrant run crew gathering to celebrate the start of Boston Marathon week.

events.name: Start Line Painting
events.description: Weather-dependent painting of the official marathon start line in Hopkinton.

events.name: Public Safety Press Conference
events.description: Official public safety briefing and press conference for the marathon.

events.name: Professional Athlete Press Conference
events.description: Elite athlete media availability ahead of the 130th Boston Marathon.

events.name: Brooks Hyperion House — Opening Day
events.description: Opening day of Brooks' marathon-week home base. Drop in for brand experiences, exclusive giveaways, running gear, and community programming. No RSVP required for general hours.

events.name: Global Launch powered by Nike Running
events.location: Heartbreak Hill Running Co. South End
events.description: Signature Speed workout and in-store party celebrating the 60th anniversary of Bobbi Gibb's barrier-breaking 1966 Boston Marathon run. Theme: 'Purpose Not Permission.'

events.name: Local's Night powered by Nike Running
events.location: Heartbreak Hill Running Co. South End
events.description: Light taper run to keep legs fresh before race weekend. A locals-only celebration of the Boston running community.

events.name: Adidas Hyperboost Shakeout with Alex Herm
events.description: Shakeout run and coffee bar with adidas ambassador Alex Herm. Test the new Hyperboost ahead of race day.

events.name: Boston Marathon Expo — Day 1
events.location: John B. Hynes Veterans Memorial Convention Center
events.description: Official bib pickup, sponsor pavilion, photo ops, and the largest collection of adidas Boston Marathon merchandise. Free and open to the public.

events.name: Boston Marathon Fan Fest — Day 1
events.description: Live music, entertainment, photo opportunities, meet & greets, and sponsor activations. Free and open to the public.

events.name: Samuel Adams Run Pub at Fan Fest
events.description: Samuel Adams beer garden and drinks pop-up within the Fan Fest footprint at City Hall Plaza.

events.name: Brooks Hyperion House — Day 2
events.description: Drop-in brand experience with rotating panels, shakeout runs, exclusive giveaways, and community programming.

events.name: Behind the Mount to Coast — Film, Q&A & Community Night
events.description: Film screening of the BITR H1 documentary followed by Q&A and community gathering. Part of Marathon Sports' weekend event series.

events.name: Sips & Saucony
events.description: Saucony shop-and-sip event with Cadence Electrolyte Mocktails and DJ Mez Wav spinning. A pre-race party celebrating running culture.

events.name: rabbit Welcome Reception
events.description: Welcome reception with drinks and light bites at rabbit's Newbury Street pop-up shop. Celebrate the start of marathon weekend with the rabbit community.

events.name: Heartbreak Honors powered by Nike Running
events.location: Heartbreak Hill Running Co. South End
events.description: Annual awards ceremony celebrating community members who embody the spirit of running. Hosted by co-founder Dan Fitzgerald with artist Luke McCambley. Refreshments and surprises included.

events.name: Boston Marathon Lights the Way
events.description: Spectacular evening showcase illuminating the iconic Fairmont Copley Plaza hotel. A visual marathon weekend tradition.

events.name: Boston 5K presented by Mass General Brigham
events.location: Boston Common to Boylston St Finish Line
events.description: Nearly 10,000 participants race 3.1 miles from Boston Common through Back Bay to the official Boston Marathon finish line on Boylston Street. Kicks off Patriots' Day Weekend.

events.name: BAA Gives Back presented by Bank of America
events.description: Community service event during marathon weekend giving back to the city of Boston.

events.name: rabbit Pop-Up Shakeout Run (Saturday)
events.description: Easy shakeout run meeting at the rabbit Newbury Street pop-up. First 75 runners receive goodr sunglasses. Beverages by Yerba Madre served afterward.

events.name: Tracksmith Stamata Event + 'Chasing 2:37' Screening
events.description: 3-mile shakeout run with Team Stamata followed by a special screening of Tracksmith's docu-series 'Chasing 2:37' and an athlete panel discussion. Light breakfast served.

events.name: Boston Marathon Expo — Day 2
events.location: John B. Hynes Veterans Memorial Convention Center
events.description: Official bib pickup, sponsor pavilion, photo ops, and adidas Boston Marathon merchandise. Free and open to the public.

events.name: BAA 5K Afterparty with adidas
events.description: Post-race celebration for all BAA 5K participants and supporters. Hosted by adidas and Heartbreak Hill Running Co.

events.name: Boston Marathon Fan Fest — Day 2
events.description: Live music, entertainment, photo opportunities, sponsor activations. Samuel Adams Run Pub on-site. Free and open to the public.

events.name: Brooks Hyperion House — Day 3 (Panel + Shakeout)
events.description: Featured panel 'What Does It Take?' hosted by Ashley Mateo with Brooks women's elite marathon squad. Plus shakeout runs, giveaways, and community programming.

events.name: BAA Invitational Mile
events.description: Exciting mile races on Boylston Street for middle school, high school, and professional athletes. Free to spectate.

events.name: BAA Youth Mile
events.description: Free event for youth runners ages 7–14 to experience the thrill of running up and down Boylston Street at the official marathon finish line.

events.name: Heartbreak Street Fair powered by Nike Running
events.location: Heartbreak Hill Running Co. South End
events.description: Free outdoor street fair with running services, photo ops, giveaways, and guest appearances. Open to all.

events.name: Alexi Pappas Meet & Greet with Feetures
events.description: Meet Olympic runner, author, and filmmaker Alexi Pappas at the Feetures booth on Newbury Street.

events.name: RIVS Run Club x Marathon Sports Shake-Out Run
events.description: Community shakeout run hosted by Craft Sportswear and iFIT. Kick off marathon weekend with the RIVS Run Club community.

events.name: Movie Premiere: 'Boston, You Earned It' with adidas
events.description: World premiere of the film 'Boston, You Earned It' by directors Devin Miller and Fidelis Teixeira, documenting the preparation and community connection of marathon runners. Popcorn and giveaways included.

events.name: Boston Marathon Lights the Way
events.description: Second evening of the spectacular showcase illuminating the iconic Fairmont Copley Plaza hotel.

events.name: Heartbreak Shakeout Run powered by Nike Running
events.location: Heartbreak Hill Running Co. South End
events.description: Described as the 'most ambitious shakeout ever,' featuring Nike global legends and current professional athletes. The perfect pre-race tune-up.

events.name: Zappos Boston Marathon Shakeout Run
events.description: Free community shakeout run with Zappos and Gansett Run Club through the North End to Paul Revere Park. Demo shoes from multiple brands available. Giveaways and prizes. Open to all fitness levels.

events.name: rabbit Pop-Up Sunday Shakeout Run
events.description: Easy Sunday morning shakeout run meeting at the rabbit Newbury Street pop-up. Beverages by Yerba Madre served afterward.

events.name: Boston Marathon Expo — Day 3 (Final Day)
events.location: John B. Hynes Veterans Memorial Convention Center
events.description: Final day of the official expo. Last chance for bib pickup, sponsor pavilion, photo ops, and adidas Boston Marathon merchandise.

events.name: Des Shakeout Run presented by Brooks Run Club
events.description: Easy 5K shakeout along the river with Des Linden, Kara Goucher, and the Brooks Run Club. Complimentary George Howell Coffee and breakfast served after.

events.name: Brooks Hyperion House — Day 4
events.description: Pre-race community programming, giveaways, and drop-in brand experiences.

events.name: Official adidas Hyperboost Boston 2026 Shakeout
events.description: Official adidas shakeout run from Back Bay to Heartbreak Cambridge with professional athletes and community leaders. Energy, community, and surprises.

events.name: Boston Marathon Fan Fest — Day 3 (Final Day)
events.description: Final day of Fan Fest before the big race. Live music, entertainment, sponsor activations, and CITGO Road to Boston Fun Zone for kids.

events.name: Tracksmith Sunday Shakeout Run
events.description: 5K out-and-back shakeout along the Boston Marathon course led by Joachim Cassel and local Boston community members.

events.name: Mount to Coast: For The Long Run x Everyday Ultra Podcast
events.description: Live podcast recording featuring Jonathan Levitt (For The Long Run) and Joe Corcione (Everyday Ultra). A candid conversation about the running life.

events.name: Mangia Sunday — Marathon Carbo-Loading Dinner
events.description: Special pre-race carbo-loading dinner with five entrée options and 'Heartbreak Hill Approved' simple pasta dishes. The perfect final meal before race day.

events.name: Boston Marathon Lights the Way (Final Night)
events.description: Final evening of the Lights the Way showcase at the Fairmont Copley Plaza. Last pre-race illumination event.

events.name: 130th Boston Marathon presented by Bank of America
events.address: Start: Hopkinton, MA | Finish: Boylston St, Boston, MA
events.description: The main event. The 130th running of the world's oldest annual marathon. ~30,000 runners, multiple staggered wave starts. CLIF bar sampling and sponsor activations along the course.

events.name: CITGO Fueling Good Runway
events.description: Designated runway activation for marathon runners as they depart the Athletes' Village. A high-energy sendoff experience sponsored by CITGO.

events.name: Heartbreak Cheer Zone powered by Nike Running
events.description: Cheer zone and spectator support location at the legendary Mile 20 Heartbreak Hill. One of the best spots to cheer on runners at the race's most famous climb.

events.name: CITGO One-Mile-to-Go Block Party
events.description: Family-friendly community celebration under the iconic CITGO sign at the marathon's final mile. Free and open to all.

events.name: CITGO Road to Boston Fun Zone
events.description: Youth-focused interactive activities at Fan Fest celebrating milestones along the marathon route. Organized by CITGO.

events.name: Mile 27 Post-Race Party presented by Samuel Adams
events.description: The official post-race party for the 130th Boston Marathon. Beer garden, sponsor activations, food, and live music celebrating finishers. Tickets: $10.

events.name: Brooks Hyperion House Finisher Celebration
events.description: Post-race celebration for finishers with Brooks athletes, giveaways, community gathering, and finisher programming.

events.name: Oiselle Cheer Zone at Coolidge Corner
events.description: Stake out a spot on the course with Oiselle at Coolidge Corner. Free spectator zone with Oiselle community presence.

events.name: Heartbreak Afterparty powered by Nike Running
events.description: Official post-race afterparty for runners and supporters, powered by Nike Running and Heartbreak Hill Running Co.

events.name: Boston Marathon Champions Press Conference
events.description: Post-race media availability with the 130th Boston Marathon champions.

events.name: Finisher Medal Engraving with Saucony
events.description: Celebrate your finish by getting your official Boston Marathon medal engraved with your finishing time. Compliments of Saucony.

events.name: Marathon Sports Finisher Portraits
events.description: You earned this moment — now capture it. Free professional finisher portrait sessions at Marathon Sports.

events.name: Tracksmith Free Commemorative Posters
events.description: Pick up a free commemorative Tracksmith poster celebrating the 130th Boston Marathon. Available all day Tuesday and leftover Monday post-race stock while supplies last.
